settingsExcludeDailyNotesDesc: Skip notes that have a custom-dailynote-yyyymmdd attribute. This also applies to notebook scans and batch execution.
settingsWhitelistDesc: The plugin can only recommend from these existing classification tags and will only replace tags in this range.
settingsLabelDescriptionsDesc: Add classification guidance per tag. Descriptions are stored locally and kept even if a tag is temporarily deleted.
menuAnalyzeCurrentAndChildren: Analyze Current Document and Child Documents
missingDocPath: The current document path is unavailable, so child documents cannot be collected.
invalidSettings: Configure API Key and the classification tag range before running AutoTag.
queueAddedWithSkipped: Queued ${count} analysis task(s), skipped ${skipped} document(s) already in progress.
queueNoNewTasks: All selected documents are already being processed.
dailyNoteSkipSingle: Daily notes are excluded by the current AutoTag setting.
dailyNoteSkipped: Skipped ${count} daily note(s) due to the current AutoTag setting.
emptyWhitelist: The classification tag range is empty.
emptySuggestion: The model did not return any valid classification tags.
reviewNoPrimary: The model did not choose any primary tags this time.
reviewNoAlternatives: The model did not return any alternatives this time.
whitelistEmpty: No existing tags were found in this workspace.
descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the scope, criteria, or boundaries of this tag
scanNotStarted: Choose a notebook and start scanning.
scanNoResults: No unclassified notes were found in this notebook.
scanNoVisibleResults: No notes match the current filter.
scanNoSelection: Select at least one note first.
